rationale: The citing paper references Berger and Milkman (2012) as part of a grouped citation to support a general background claim that consumer-to-consumer sharing can be driven by self-enhancement. It does not build hypotheses specifically on that paper's arousal/virality mechanism, reuse its data or methods, or position its contribution as extending or challenging that study. The citation functions as broad literature support within a larger argument about influencer versus brand messaging.
